13.reason: The condition should be `visited[i] == 0` (not visited) instead of `visited[i] != 0` (already visited). This causes the DFS to never visit unvisited neighbors, leading to incorrect traversal and potential infinite recursion.

29.reason: The condition should be `visited[i] == 0` (not visited) instead of `visited[i] != 0` (already visited). This causes the BFS to never enqueue unvisited neighbors, resulting in an incorrect traversal.
